title: deathwatch
description: tracks player deaths, so you don't miss things like "[A silly dragon] was pricked to death by a cactus."
body:
deathwatch lets you track player deaths on your server.

Make sure you never miss things like "[USERNAME] was pricked to death by a cactus."

Death information is stored in the "JSON Lines" format. Each day gets its own file, named like `deathwatch/YYYY/MM/DD.jsonl` (e.g. `deathwatch/2026/03/14.jsonl`).

The format of each entry is [documented on GitHub](https://github.com/canine-systems/deathwatch#readme).

When combined with [deathwatch-viewer](https://github.com/canine-systems/deathwatch-viewer), you can get a website showing a log of player deaths on your server:

![Screenshot of the deathwatch viewer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c4d74741f58ccce1ef9c1f02e0a28335724c989.png)
